title: Two kids on a bench (Repel D)

entities.girl: a girl with arms crossed looking away
entities.boy: a boy with arms crossed looking away

scenes.title: The Park Bench Fight
scenes.background_prompt: A park bench under a tree, a path, a trash bin, and pigeons on the ground. Overcast afternoon. No people.
scenes.full_scene_prompt: A park bench under a leafy tree on an overcast afternoon. A girl of about nine in a red jacket sits on the far left end of the wooden bench, arms tightly crossed, body angled away to the left, her face set in a stubborn scowl. A boy of about the same age in a blue windbreaker sits on the far right end, arms also crossed, body angled away to the right, mirroring her posture exactly. The middle of the bench is conspicuously empty — a wide gap between them. Both refuse to look at each other. A crumpled piece of paper (perhaps the cause of the argument) lies on the bench between them. Pigeons peck at crumbs on the path in front of the bench, unbothered. A trash bin stands to the side, and a few fallen leaves are caught against the bench legs.
scenes.composition_instructions: Place girl on the far left end of the bench, sitting with arms tightly crossed, body angled away to the left, stubborn scowl. Place boy on the far right end, sitting with arms crossed, body angled away to the right, mirroring her. Wide empty gap in the middle.
scenes.scene_description: In the bottom left foreground, a patch of green grass is dotted with small white, yellow, and pink flowers, alongside several tall, thin leafy plants. A grey stone-paved path curves from the bottom left corner toward the right side of the frame. To the right of the path in the foreground, more green grass contains yellow and white flowers and several clusters of green leafy plants. Moving to the midground on the left, a large, thick tree trunk with visible roots sits on the left, its dense green canopy extending across the top left of the image. Underneath this tree is a wooden bench with a brown metal frame. A girl with shoulder-length brown hair is sitting on the left side of the bench. She wears a yellow sweater, a green skirt, blue leggings, and brown boots. She has her arms crossed and is looking away to the left with a frowning, angry expression. To her right on the same bench sits a boy with curly brown hair. He is wearing a green sweater with yellow stripes on the sleeves, brown vertically-striped pants, and blue shoes. Like the girl, he has his arms crossed and is looking away to the right with a frowning, angry expression. To the right of the bench stands a cylindrical trash can made of vertical wooden slats with a silver metal rim. Behind the bench and the trash can, there are various green bushes and trees. The landscape opens up into rolling green hills under a light blue sky. A single green tree stands on a hill in the mid-right background. Large, fluffy white and grey clouds fill the upper portion of the sky, particularly on the right side. The overall lighting suggests a bright, overcast day in a park setting.

CH: a girl with shoulder-length brown hair
a boy with curly brown hair
S: a park with rolling green hills
IE: an argument that caused a fight
P: wanting to stay on opposite sides
CO: not playing together in the park

ENP: a wooden bench with metal legs
